name: OpenClaw Context Optimizer
description: Local file/log/JSON/CSV/tree reducers and policy helpers for agent triage before expensive reads

enabled.description: Load plugin (disabling skips registration only; CLI still works)

verbose.description: Log plugin bootstrap to the console

defaultPreset.description: Default preset passed to helpers (balanced | agent | triage | aggressive | schema)

maxFileBytes.description: Soft cap for auto-suggestions: above this, policy leans toward reducers

extensions.description: Optional extra file extensions (without dot) to treat as text-ish for routing hints

matchers.description: When suggestOnLargeRead is on: only warn if resolved path contains one of these substrings

suggestOnLargeRead.description: Opt-in: before configured read-like tool calls, log policy hints when file size ≥ maxFileBytes

readToolNames.description: Tool names treated as file reads for suggestOnLargeRead (default: ["read"])

logSuggestions.description: When suggestOnLargeRead: emit console.warn with advise summary (set false to register hook quietly)

silent.description: Suppress console.warn from suggestions while still calling onSuggestion

suggestDryRunVerbose.description: Log JSON trace (traceLargeReadSuggestion) on each candidate read for tuning matchers/threshold

suggestOnLargeRead.label: Suggest on large read tool calls
